title: Arlong Watches the Humans Struggle
description: On pages 13–16, arlong watches the humans struggle focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.
scene: On pages 13–16, arlong watches the humans struggle focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fine, since you want to be killed so badly, allow me to make it quick!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong, I've already asked you not to fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do you seriously think you can win against us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You bet I think so, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now let go of my hand!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why don't we play this game?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Devil fruit users are said to be unable to swim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, in this situation, even a non-devil fruit user wouldn't be able to swim...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's gonna throw him into the sea!?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
